description_long: This ornate earring features a dark metallic structure with intricate detailing along its length, culminating in a cluster of deep red, teardrop-shaped gemstones that dangle at the bottom. The upper section includes a small sculpted figure or motif, adding a touch of classical or vintage flair. The main body is spherical, adorned with decorative metalwork and multiple gemstone settings. The gemstones are set in prong-like mounts, giving the piece a rich, luxurious appearance. The hook at the top is slender and slightly curved, designed for easy attachment to the ear. The overall design is elaborate, with a strong emphasis on both metallic craftsmanship and gemstone display.
description: An elaborate metallic earring with deep red teardrop gemstones and intricate sculpted details, featuring a dangling cluster design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved hook and the layered arrangement of red gemstones beneath the ornate metallic body.
description_view_1: Frontal view displaying the symmetrical arrangement of two earrings, highlighting the sculpted upper motif and the clustered gemstones.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the curvature of the hook and the depth of the gemstone cluster.
description_view_3: Rear-angled view showing the back of the metallic body and the arrangement of the dangling gemstones.
